gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, checking the health and metrics of all the amazing apps in our community greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS directory.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app showcase reflects accurate, up-to-date health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A robot and Polly the bee acting as gardeners, checking on the health of various pixelated plants (representing apps) in a greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Lime green (#ecf874) flower pots and soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Lime green (#ecf874) flower pots and soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
